core.tooltip: Mobile SDK for iOS, Android, and cross-platform frameworks — your app's in-app purchase infrastructure. Active from first launch, it manages the entire purchase and subscription lifecycle.

ads.tooltip: Apple Search Ads campaigns that put your ad in front of users. Configured and monitored inside Ads Manager.
Search terms you bid on in Apple Ads. Ads Manager suggests keywords, automates bids, and lets you add negatives.
Head-to-head A/B tests of Apple Ads custom product pages to find which page converts more clicks into installs.

attribution.tooltip: Direct integrations with Meta Ads and TikTok for Business. Adapty ties their ad spend to your subscription revenue, not just installs, eliminating the need for MMPs.
Attribution URLs for ad networks without a direct integration. They carry campaign context from the ad to the install.
Routes new users to specific in-app content on first launch, even if they clicked the ad before installing.

also.tooltip: Web-to-app landing pages built in FunnelFox that drive shoppers to your App Store or Google Play listing.

core.tooltip: Visual no-code editor for onboarding screens, paywalls, and quizzes. Renders natively via the SDK.
A logical spot in your app where a flow appears, like onboarding or a paywall. Fetch it by ID from the SDK to show the right flow to each audience.
Visual no-code editor for onboarding screens, paywalls, and quizzes. Renders natively via the SDK.
Sell subscriptions, one-time purchases, and consumables across the App Store, Play Store, and web from a single dashboard entity.
Introductory, promotional, and win-back discounts configured in the App Store or Google Play.
Compare flow variants against each other to find what converts best. No code changes required.

mail.tooltip: Email campaigns that motivate new users to make their first purchase.
A per-recipient landing page presenting your offer. This is what email openers see when they click through.

core.tooltip: Mobile SDK. Handles the purchase transaction, receipt validation, and access-level assignment.
Control what different subscribers can access. Most apps use just one; add more when you want to gate different features for different plans.
Per-user records. Each purchase updates the user's subscription state, revenue total, and event timeline.
A live view of every event Adapty generates, with its export status to your integrations.
Send every subscription event to your backend in real time — set up once, no polling.

ads.tooltip: The specific Apple Ads keyword that drove the install, attributed to each purchase in Ads Manager.

attribution.tooltip: Ties each subscription-revenue event back to the ad campaign that drove the install.

mail.tooltip: The payment step of an email-driven purchase. Every transaction is attributed back to the email that drove it.

core.tooltip: Track monthly recurring revenue from active paid subscriptions, normalized to a monthly figure.
Track how many paid subscriptions are currently active. Excludes trials and cancelled renewals.
Track how many users renew through each subscription period, cohort by cohort.
Track users who turned off auto-renew but still have active access — your best window for winback.
Track subscriptions in the recovery window after a failed payment — up to 6 days for weekly, 16 for other billing periods.
Track subscriptions blocked by an unresolved payment failure — a recovery opportunity before churn.
Track subscriptions that expired for any reason — voluntary cancel or billing failure.

mail.tooltip: Sends targeted emails automatically when a user cancels renewal, hits a billing issue, or churns. No scheduling required.

core.tooltip: User segments filtered by subscription state — cancelled, billing issue, or expired — for targeting winback campaigns.

mail.tooltip: AI-generated multi-email sequences designed to re-engage churned or lapsed subscribers.
Automatically emails users who request refunds. Learn what went wrong and offer a better fit.
The payment step of an email-driven purchase. Every transaction is attributed back to the email that drove it.

core.tooltip: Revenue, MRR, LTV, churn, cohort, funnel, and retention charts — the full picture of your subscription business.
Predicted LTV and revenue for each cohort at 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, and 24 months out.
Know exactly what to A/B test next. AI benchmarks your paywall against 20,000+ apps and ranks the experiments most likely to lift revenue.

ads.tooltip: Chat assistant that answers full-funnel questions about your Apple Ads account in plain language. Advisory only.
Competitor keyword bids across 50+ countries, updated daily.
Cohort revenue and LTV metrics surfaced in Ads Manager, so bidding reflects long-term value beyond the install.

attribution.tooltip: Projected revenue and unit economics per acquisition cohort. Compare campaigns before their cohorts mature.
Track return on ad spend — revenue divided by spend — per campaign and channel.

mail.tooltip: Compare two or more full email campaigns against each other inside a flow.

also.tooltip: Cash upfront against your future subscription revenue — an alternative to raising equity or taking on a loan.
